name: Preserved Kumquats (Mom)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the kumquats thoroughly.
2. Pour boiling water over the kumquats; let them cool completely.
3. Remove any film of oil that forms on top of the water.
4. Slice the kumquats crosswise and remove the seeds.
5. Measure the sliced fruit, then add an equal amount of sugar and a small splash of lemon juice.
6. Gently simmer the mixture over low heat until it becomes translucent, stirring frequently.
7. Serve with toast.
(If the preserved kumquats are sufficient to store, place them in sterilized jars and seal.)
